The '''A'driannamieq Mountains''' were mountains on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Elom (planet)/Legends|Elom]]. The native [[Elom/Legends|Elom]] and [[Ranphyx]] lived in the A'driannamieq Mountains.<ref name="GG12" />
